LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Food_Crate.description: A Bruderschaft des Stahls ration crate containing preserved military meals, purified water, and nutritional supplements. Designed to sustain saltiers during extended operations in the harsh wasteland environment.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Food_Crate.label: Kiste mit Lebensmittelvorräten der Bruderschaft
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Uniform_Crate.d: A specialized Bruderschaft des Stahls uniform crate containing the distinctive gear worn by Elder Lyons' reformed Brotherhood. These uniforms represent the faction's humanitarian mission and their commitment to protecting the innocent.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Outcast_Uniform_Crate.descr: Eine Vorratskiste der Ausgestoßenen der Bruderschaft mit den charakteristischen roten und schwarzen Uniformen, die von der puristischen Fraktion getragen werden. Diese Uniformen symbolisieren ihre unerschütterliche Hingabe an den ursprünglichen Codex und ihre Mission, Vorkriegstechnologie um jeden Preis zurückzugewinnen.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Outcast_Uniform_Crate.label: Kiste mit Uniform der Ausgestoßenen
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Standard_Tech_Resource_Crat: A sealed Bruderschaft des Stahls supply crate containing essential technological components, spare parts, and advanced materials. These resources are crucial for maintaining and upgrading their sophisticated equipment and installations.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Standard_Uniform_Crate.desc: A Bruderschaft des Stahls supply crate containing standard-issue uniforms, fatigues, and protective gear worn by regular Brotherhood personnel. Each piece bears the distinctive colors and insignia of the faction.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Standard_Weapon_Crate.descr: A sealed Bruderschaft des Stahls weapon crate containing high-quality firearms and energy weapons used by their forces. The distinctive red and metallic finish bears the Brotherhood's emblematic cogwheel.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Standard_Weapon_Crate.label: Bruderschaft des Stahls Weapon Crate
